cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, is this Gokul Krishna? Sir, we have an urgent matter regarding your GMX Mail account.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Who is this? How did you get my number, ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm calling from GMX Mail security team. We've detected a request to change your account's recovery phone number. Can you confirm if you initiated this change? Yes or no, please.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Wait, how do I know you're really from GMX Mail? What's going on with my account, haan?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I assure you, sir, this is a legitimate call. We're just verifying the change to ensure your account's security. Did you or did you not request this change?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, okay... Yes, I did request the change. But how do you know it was really me?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: That's what we're trying to verify, sir. As per our security protocols, we need to confirm such changes with the account holder directly.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, I see. Well, I did make the request, so you can go ahead with the change.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Thank you, Mr. Krishna. Your account's security is our top priority. Is there anything else I can assist you with today?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 60s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: An agent from [EMAIL_PROVIDER] calls a user to verify a recent, user-initiated request to change their account's recovery phone number. The agent asks the user to confirm "Yes" or "No" if they initiated this change.
